doctrine: Everything field-native — g16, GPY GrokVM, g16-as/ld, Hostess7. No host-python fallback. No cache-for-speed.

stack.python: GPY-16 GrokVM + GPY16_TOOLING for forge scripts

rules: g16_gpy_run invokes gpy-16 only — fail closed without field driver
Forge tooling runs GPY16_TOOLING in-process with field env
500x target is field kernel runtime + GrokVM throughput
forbidden: host python3 fallback in toolchain scripts
